2604.23839.title: Focus on What Matters: Two-Stage ROI-Aware Refinement for Anatomy-Preserving Fetal Ultrasound Reconstruction
2604.23839.paper_summary: Measurement-critical ultrasound tasks often depend on a small anatomical region, making global reconstruction metrics an unreliable proxy for clinical fidelity. We propose an ROI-aware representation learning framework and instantiate it for first-trimester nuchal translucency (NT) screening under multi-hospital domain shift. A two-phase convolutional autoencoder (CAE) first learns a globally faithful 128-D latent code via MS-SSIM, then refines the NT ROI using intensity (L1) and normalized Sobel-edge constraints. To combine these heterogeneous objectives without manual tuning, we initialize loss weights via gradient-based calibration from per-term gradient magnitudes. Under strict hospital-wise evaluation with one hospital held out, ROI refinement improves both global and measurement-relevant quality: on the standard dev split it increases PSNR by +0.27 dB (val) and +0.29 dB (held-out test), reduces ROI MAE by 8.87% (val) and 6.43% (held-out test), and reduces ROI Edge-MAE by 11.10% on source hospitals and 4.90% on the unseen hospital. Beyond reconstruction, frozen-latent probes provide additional evidence of generalization: hospital provenance becomes less confidently predictable on the unseen site (0.556 to 0.541 max-softmax; 0.684 to 0.688 entropy) while OOD detection remains strong across site-held-out protocols (Mahalanobis AUROC up to 0.9956, with modest KNN gains in challenging splits). The same ROI-aware refinement principle is anatomy-agnostic and can be adopted for other fetal biometry targets (e.g., crown-rump length (CRL), nasal bone (NB)) and broader medical imaging settings where small ROIs dominate clinical decisions.
2604.23839.paper_summary_zh: 測量關鍵的超聲任務通常依賴於一個小的解剖區域，使得全球重建指標成為臨床真實性的可靠代理變得不可靠。我們提出了一個關注ROI的表徵學習框架，並將其應用於多醫院領域轉移下的第一孕期頸部透明層（NT）篩查。一個兩階段的卷積自編碼器（CAE）首先通過MS-SSIM學習一個全球忠實的128-D潛在代碼，然後使用強度（L1）和歸一化的索貝爾邊緣約束來細化NT ROI。為了在不進行手動調整的情況下結合這些異質目標，我們通過基於梯度的校準從每項梯度大小初始化損失權重。在嚴格的醫院評估中，保留一個醫院進行測試，ROI的細化改善了全球和測量相關的質量：在標準開發集上，PSNR增加了+0.27 dB（驗證集）和+0.29 dB（保留測試），ROI MAE減少了8.87%（驗證集）和6.43%（保留測試），並且在源醫院上ROI邊緣MAE減少了11.10%，在未見醫院上減少了4.90%。除了重建之外，凍結潛在探針提供了額外的泛化證據：在未見地點，醫院來源的預測信心降低（0.556到0.541的最大softmax；0.684到0.688的熵），而OOD檢測在地點保留的協議中保持強勁（Mahalanobis AUROC高達0.9956，在挑戰性分割中有適度的KNN增益）。相同的關注ROI的細化原則是解剖無關的，可以應用於其他胎兒生物測量目標（例如，頭臀長（CRL）、鼻骨（NB））和更廣泛的醫學影像設置，其中小ROI主導臨床決策。
2604.23839.author: Ines Abbes et.al.
2604.23839.authors: Ines Abbes, Mahmood Alzubaidi, Mowafa Househ, Khalid Alyafei, Marco Agus, Samir Brahim Belhaouari
